findings.title: Dynamic import of user-reachable arch.ts executes arbitrary code in daemon process
findings.detail: InvariantRunner.runArch() calls import() on arch.ts under .ifleet/invariants/<repoSlug>/. Path traversal protection added and invariantsRoot pinned to IFleet repo root. Risk reduced but dynamic import of repo-controlled code persists.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace dynamic import with sandboxed subprocess; or sign and verify arch.ts before execution.

findings.title: TLS verification disabled for Supabase/PostgreSQL when CA cert path is not set
findings.detail: getKgPool() sets rejectUnauthorized:false when SUPABASE_CA_CERT_PATH is not set. Enables MitM attacks against Supabase data.
findings.fix_sketch: Require SUPABASE_CA_CERT_PATH or set rejectUnauthorized:true unconditionally.

findings.title: Public control plane cancel only marks store state; running pipeline worker is NOT killed
findings.detail: cancelSprint() calls handle.cancel() but if abortController is not provided in the bootstrap, cancellation is a no-op. Pipeline continues executing and may open a PR.
findings.fix_sketch: Make abortController required in PipelineRunBootstrap; throw in PipelineBridge.spawn() if not provided.

findings.title: Docker sandbox runs as --user root inside every container
findings.detail: buildDockerArgs() passes '--user','root' for all phases. Container escape in verifier tooling runs with root privileges.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace '--user','root' with '--user','1000:1000' and pre-create /work with those permissions in the image.

findings.title: Editor reviewer and doctor roles receive architect output as direct Claude instructions with no injection filter
findings.detail: buildBrief() wraps user brief via quoteAsUserData() but architect plan (mode.plan) is injected as trusted instruction. A prompt-injected architect output can escalate to the editor which has write/bash permissions.
findings.fix_sketch: Wrap mode.plan with quoteAsUserData() and add explicit trust labels.

findings.title: GitHub token exposed via git -c argument visible in proc cmdline and ps output
findings.detail: authPrefix() constructs git -c http.extraheader=AUTHORIZATION: bearer <token>. Token visible to any process reading /proc/<pid>/cmdline.
findings.fix_sketch: Use GIT_ASKPASS or credential helper instead of -c argument.

findings.title: Bash cat glob in worker allow list can exfiltrate arbitrary host files
findings.detail: WORKER_CLAUDE_PERMISSIONS includes Bash(cat *). A prompt-injected worker can read /etc/environment, ~/.claude/settings.json, or any daemon-readable file.
findings.fix_sketch: Restrict to Bash(cat /work/*) or remove cat and rely on the Read tool which is path-scoped.

findings.title: markCancelled in UnifiedQueueAdapter missing conditional fromState guard
findings.detail: Fixed: markCancelled now reads current state via getById() and returns early if already terminal.
findings.fix_sketch: Already applied.

findings.title: markFindingClosed writes index.json and closed.json non-atomically
findings.detail: audit-runner.ts writes index.json then closed.json without a lock, enabling a race where concurrent scan reads a partially updated index.
findings.fix_sketch: Wrap both writes in withClosedJsonLock().

findings.title: GitHub drain loop has premature break on duplicate ID before exclusion set insertion
findings.detail: GitHubIssuesSource.drain() continues without adding to exclude on duplicate ID. Safe via pickNext excludeIds but creates a logic smell.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove redundant seen.has check or always update exclusion set.

findings.title: getAllPrDecisions defaults to 50000 rows with no streaming
findings.detail: Fixed: default limit reduced from 50,000 to 5,000 to avoid multi-hundred-MB allocations on long-running daemons.
findings.fix_sketch: Already applied: default limit now 5000.

findings.title: MemoryNonceLedger setInterval timer not unref-ed causing Node.js process hang in tests
findings.detail: Fixed: MemoryNonceLedger now calls .unref() on the setInterval timer.
findings.fix_sketch: Already applied.

findings.title: Discord broadcast messages silently dropped with no dead-letter log when outbox not configured
findings.detail: broadcastIFleet() falls back to fire-and-forget webhook POST. If call fails: no retry, no dead-letter, no log.
findings.fix_sketch: Log failures at console.error level with message content.

findings.title: repoSlug hardcoded to IFleet in VerifierController preventing multi-repo invariant checking
findings.detail: VerifierController uses fixed repoSlug regardless of the repo being verified. Workers against other repos receive IFleet's invariants.
findings.fix_sketch: Derive repoSlug from task.repo field (replace / with _).

findings.title: Package imports cross package boundary via deep relative path traversals
findings.detail: packages/orchestrator-core/src/discord/audit-runner.ts imports from '../../../../src/audit/' crossing the monorepo package boundary.
findings.fix_sketch: Move audit-runner.ts to src/audit/ or add audit types to orchestrator-core package.

findings.title: node_modules symlink in worktree allows workers to install packages affecting all concurrent tasks
findings.detail: setupWorktree() symlinks node_modules from main repo into each worktree. A worker running pnpm install would affect all other running worktrees.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove node_modules symlink from worktree setup.

findings.title: wrapBriefAsData does not scrub BRIEF_DATA_MARKER_OPEN from user input enabling nested block injection
findings.detail: Fixed: wrapBriefAsData and quoteAsUserData both now scrub BRIEF_DATA_MARKER_OPEN in addition to BRIEF_DATA_MARKER_CLOSE.
findings.fix_sketch: Already applied.

findings.title: spawnCapture passes full process.env minus GIT_ vars exposing secrets to git subprocess hooks
findings.detail: spawnCapture() strips only GIT_* vars, passing GITHUB_TOKEN, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN, IFLEET_HMAC_SECRET to git hooks.
findings.fix_sketch: Apply claudeChildEnv() allowlist pattern or strip known secrets from git subprocess env.

findings.title: getKgPool caches pool module-level with no connection error handler
findings.detail: Fixed: cachedPool.on('error', ...) now added after pool creation to prevent unhandled error events from crashing the daemon.
findings.fix_sketch: Already applied.

findings.title: DiscordOutbox table DDL duplicated between discord-outbox.ts and store.ts SCHEMA risking silent drift
findings.detail: The discord_outbox CREATE TABLE statement appears in two places. If one is updated without the other, migrations may fail or create mismatched schemas.
findings.fix_sketch: Extract DDL to a shared constant and import in both files.

findings.title: verify and force_pr commands silently no-op on public control plane returning false 202 success
findings.detail: In server.ts the public ControlPlane has onVerify and onForcePr as optional. If not provided (current default), /control with verify or force_pr returns 200 but does nothing.
findings.fix_sketch: Wire callbacks or return 501 Not Implemented.

findings.title: Verifier docker image ifleet-verifier:base assumed to exist with no build or pull probe at startup
findings.detail: DockerSandboxRunner uses DEFAULT_IMAGE='ifleet-verifier:base' with no check that the image exists before first verification run.
findings.fix_sketch: Add probeImage() at startup that pulls or logs clear error if image is absent.

findings.title: ControlPlane HTTP server destroys nonce store before draining in-flight connections
findings.detail: server.close() callback runs nonceLedger.destroy() immediately. In-flight requests will see a destroyed nonce store.
findings.fix_sketch: Call nonceLedger.destroy() after server.close() callback fires (all connections drained).

findings.title: pendingCount derived from stale in-memory snapshot can trigger spurious rate-pause
findings.detail: Previously fixed in audit/nightly-2026-07-22.
findings.fix_sketch: Already fixed.

findings.title: durationMs inflated by pause time when sprint is paused and resumed before completing
findings.detail: Previously fixed in audit/nightly-2026-07-22.
findings.fix_sketch: Already fixed.

findings.title: console.warn used for routine informational log messages throughout server.ts and daemon.ts
findings.detail: console.warn used for boot messages like 'recovered N stale tasks'. Should be console.info to not pollute error monitoring.
findings.fix_sketch: Change console.warn to console.info for normal operation messages.

findings.title: TaskSource interface has no markCancelled causing cancelled tasks to appear as failed in GitHub and Discord
findings.detail: TaskSource.markFailed is called for cancelled tasks. GitHub gets auto:failed label for deliberate operator cancels.
findings.fix_sketch: Add optional markCancelled to TaskSource interface.

findings.title: Silently swallowed errors in void fire-and-forget chains in repos/manager.ts
findings.detail: Several async operations in repos/manager.ts are called with void and have silent catch blocks.
findings.fix_sketch: Log caught errors at console.warn with a [manager] tag.

findings.title: apps/wahq-bot/src/index.ts is an empty stub with only an export statement
findings.detail: The wahq-bot app is a placeholder. Unnecessary workspace overhead until Agent SDK migration lands.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a TODO comment pointing to AGENTS.md note about Agent SDK backlog.
